title: geranium atropurpureum var. furcatum
intro: Geranium atropurpureum var. furcatum, also known as the purple-leafed geranium, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and fungal infections. The health benefits of geranium atropurpureum var. furcatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in teas, tinctures, and salves, and it can also be used as a natural insect repellent due to its strong scent.
